name: 1 GW Alkaline Electrolyser Plant
description: Reference 1 GW alkaline electrolyser with associated balance-of-plant. Based on ~80% capacity factor, ~50 kWh/kg specific energy consumption.
caveats: Covers electrolyser plant staffing only. Ammonia synthesis, storage, transport, and dedicated RE generation workforce not included.

coefficients.notes: Allocated from IRENA aggregate using H2 relevance weights. Pressure-vessel, piping, and structural welding during build.
Allocated from IRENA aggregate using H2 relevance weights. Extensive piping for demin water, cooling, H2 gas, and KOH electrolyte.
